class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>”。<ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>；<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>缘<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>故<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>存<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cún</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>惠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>怜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lián</rt></ruby><ruby>悯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǐn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>平<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby>！

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>遵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zūn</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>甚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shèn</rt></ruby><ruby>欢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huān</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tài</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>劝<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby>。<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>条<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiáo</rt></ruby><ruby>新<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby>。<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>警<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>戒<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>假<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jiǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>师<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shī</rt></ruby>

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>许<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>迷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mí</rt></ruby><ruby>惑<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huo</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>肉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ròu</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>迷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mí</rt></ruby><ruby>惑<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huo</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>、<ruby>敌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dí</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xin</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>失<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>(<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>古<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>卷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">juǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>”)<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zháo</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>足<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>赏<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>越<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xùn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>守<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby>；<ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>守<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xùn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xùn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ān</rt></ruby>；

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">è</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>份<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fèn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>许<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>纸<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>墨<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mò</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt
